name: CNH Industrial
summary: Global manufacturer of agricultural and construction equipment, commercial vehicles, and powertrain solutions. Brands include Case IH, New Holland, and CASE Construction.
research_notes: Heavy use of embedded controls in sprayers, tractors, and combines. CAN/J1939 is standard across product lines. Active in precision agriculture and autonomous vehicle research.

name: Deere & Company
summary: World's largest manufacturer of agricultural equipment. Also produces construction, forestry, and diesel engines.
research_notes: Major embedded software employer. Uses CAN/J1939 extensively. Investing heavily in autonomy, precision ag, and edge computing.

name: Rockwell Automation
summary: Global leader in industrial automation and digital transformation. Products include PLCs, drives, and industrial IoT platforms.
research_notes: Firmware roles for industrial controllers. Uses FreeRTOS, embedded Linux, and industrial Ethernet protocols.

name: Oshkosh Corporation
summary: Manufacturer of specialty vehicles including fire trucks, military vehicles, and access equipment.
research_notes: Vehicle control systems, CAN bus, embedded software for defense and commercial vehicles.

name: Caterpillar
summary: World's leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment, diesel and natural gas engines, and industrial gas turbines.
research_notes: Large embedded engineering team. CAN/J1939 for machine control. STM32 and proprietary MCUs. Model-based development with Simulink.
